title: End-to-End Machine Learning Pipeline for prediction of Private Property Prices
description: This project covers the entire end-to-end machine learning pipeline, from raw data collection through URA's API to model training and deployment via Docker for containerization and FastAPI at backend.

title: AI Travel Itinerary Generator
description: Automated Travel Itinerary Planner built with State-of-the-Art Agentic AI tools and LLMs, featuring a simple and user-friendly interface.

title: Text to SQL Generator
description: Powered by a locally running LLM, this simple web application converts natural language queries into SQL queries to provide a simple and straightforward way for users to interact with their databases.
